name: Hyperliquid Funding-Rate Delta-Neutral
description: Open a short perp position on Hyperliquid against an equivalent long spot position elsewhere — capture the funding rate as risk-free yield. When funding is positive (longs pay shorts), this generates 15-50% APR with zero directional exposure.

secondary_chain.name: Ethereum Mainnet — for spot hedge leg

use_case: ETH perp funding rate hits +0.08% per 8h on Hyperliquid = 87% APR. Agent longs 10 ETH spot on mainnet, shorts 10 ETH perp on Hyperliquid. Net exposure = 0. Net yield = funding payments.

verification.criteria: Manual review: assert (a) perp short open on Hyperliquid for size X, (b) spot long open on Ethereum for size X, (c) delta within 2% of zero.
